'''tawoho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:osmoconformation|osmoconformation]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-w-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:osmoconformation|osmoconformation]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| tawoho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæweheth|tæweheth]] || [[word:tæwehej|tæwehej]] || [[word:tæwehesh|tæwehesh]] || [[word:tæwehe|tæwehe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:tawowohoth|tawowohoth]] || [[word:tawowohoj|tawowohoj]] || [[word:tawowohosh|tawowohosh]] || [[word:tawowoho|tawowoho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tawohoth|tawohoth]] || [[word:tawohoj|tawohoj]] || [[word:tawohosh|tawohosh]] || [[word:tawoho|tawoho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tawofhoth|tawofhoth]] || [[word:tawofhoj|tawofhoj]] || [[word:tawofhosh|tawofhosh]] || [[word:tawofhof|tawofhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tawohotho|tawohotho]] || [[word:tawohojo|tawohojo]] || [[word:tawohosho|tawohosho]] || [[word:tawohoko|tawohoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tawohoth|tawohoth]] || [[word:tawohoj|tawohoj]] || [[word:tawohosh|tawohosh]] || [[word:tawoho|tawoho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tawohothol|tawohothol]] || [[word:tawohojol|tawohojol]] || [[word:tawohoshol|tawohoshol]] || [[word:tawohokol|tawohokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tawohothotho|tawohothotho]] || [[word:tawohojojo|tawohojojo]] || [[word:tawohoshosho|tawohoshosho]] || [[word:tawohoko|tawohoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tawohothon|tawohothon]] || [[word:tawohojon|tawohojon]] || [[word:tawohoshon|tawohoshon]] || [[word:tawohokon|tawohokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tawohothoro|tawohothoro]] || [[word:tawohojoro|tawohojoro]] || [[word:tawohoshoro|tawohoshoro]] || [[word:tawohokoro|tawohokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
